content.json:
# Unified Credential Inventory
This workbook provides a combined view of **App Registration / Enterprise App** credential expiration data and **Key Vault** certificate, key, and secret inventory.

Data is collected by the **Publish-CredentialInventory** runbook.

content.query:
let appreg = AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| where CredentialType != 'None'
| summarize Expired = countif(IsExpired == true), Within30 = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false), Within31_60 = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 31 and DaysToExpiry <= 60), Within61_90 = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 61 and DaysToExpiry <= 90), Over90 = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Green')
| extend Source = 'App Registrations';
let kv = KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| where HasExpiration == true
| summarize Expired = countif(IsExpired == true), Within30 = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false), Within31_60 = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 31 and DaysToExpiry <= 60), Within61_90 = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 61 and DaysToExpiry <= 90), Over90 = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Green')
| extend Source = 'Key Vault';
union appreg, kv
| project Source, Expired, Within30, Within31_60, Within61_90, Over90
content.title: Combined SLA Expiration Counts

content.query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| summarize
    AppRegs        = dcountif(ApplicationId, ObjectType == 'AppRegistration'),
    EnterpriseApps = dcountif(ApplicationId, ObjectType == 'EnterpriseApp'),
    TotalCreds     = countif(CredentialType != 'None'),
    Expired        = countif(CredentialType != 'None' and IsExpired == true),
    ExpiringSoon   = countif(CredentialType != 'None' and ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false),
    NoCreds        = dcountif(ApplicationId, ObjectType == 'AppRegistration' and CredentialType == 'None')
| project pack_array(
    pack('Metric', 'App Registrations',         'Value', AppRegs,        'Order', 1),
    pack('Metric', 'Enterprise Apps',           'Value', EnterpriseApps, 'Order', 2),
    pack('Metric', 'Total Credentials',         'Value', TotalCreds,     'Order', 3),
    pack('Metric', 'Expired',                   'Value', Expired,        'Order', 4),
    pack('Metric', 'Expiring < 30 Days',        'Value', ExpiringSoon,   'Order', 5),
    pack('Metric', 'Without Credentials',       'Value', NoCreds,        'Order', 6))
| mv-expand Column1 to typeof(dynamic)
| evaluate bag_unpack(Column1)
| sort by Order asc
| project-away Order
content.title: App Registration Summary

content.query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| where CredentialType != 'None'
| summarize
    Total         = count(),
    Expired       = countif(IsExpired == true),
    Within30Days  = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false),
    Within31_60   = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 31 and DaysToExpiry <= 60),
    Within61_90   = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 61 and DaysToExpiry <= 90),
    Over90Days    = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Green')
content.title: App Registration SLA Counts

content.query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| where CredentialType != 'None'
| summarize Count = count() by CredentialType, ObjectType
| order by ObjectType asc, CredentialType asc
content.title: Credential Type Breakdown

content.query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| where CredentialType != 'None'
| summarize Count = count() by ExpiryBand
| order by ExpiryBand asc
content.title: App Reg Credentials by Expiry Band

content.query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| where CredentialType != 'None' and (IsExpired == true or (ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false))
| project ObjectType, ApplicationDisplayName, ApplicationId, CredentialType, CredentialDisplayName, EndDateUtc, DaysToExpiry, ExpiryBand, IsExpired
| order by DaysToExpiry asc, ApplicationDisplayName asc
content.title: App Reg — Expiring / Expired (within 30 Days)

content.query:
let filterOT   = '{ObjectType}';
let filterBand = '{AR_ExpiryBand}';
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| extend ObjectType = iff(isempty(ObjectType), 'AppRegistration', ObjectType)
| where ObjectType != 'EnterpriseApp' or column_ifexists('AppOwnerOrganizationId', '') == TenantId
| where CredentialType != 'None'
| where (filterOT == '*' or ObjectType == filterOT)
| where (filterBand == '*' or ExpiryBand == filterBand)
| project ObjectType, ApplicationDisplayName, ApplicationId, CredentialType, CredentialDisplayName, EndDateUtc, DaysToExpiry, ExpiryBand, IsExpired
| order by DaysToExpiry asc, ApplicationDisplayName asc
content.title: App Reg — All Credentials Detail

parameters.name: KV_Subscription
parameters.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SubscriptionId
| project value = SubscriptionId, label = SubscriptionId
| order by value asc
parameters.label: KV Subscription

parameters.name: KV_ExpiryBand
parameters.query:
datatable(value:string, label:string)[
'*', 'All',
'Red', 'Red (< 30 days)',
'Yellow', 'Yellow (30-90 days)',
'Green', 'Green (> 90 days)',
'Expired', 'Expired',
'NoExpiry', 'No Expiry Set'
]
parameters.label: KV Expiry Band

content.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| summarize
    TotalVaults     = dcount(VaultName),
    TotalItems      = count(),
    Certificates    = countif(ItemType == 'Certificate'),
    Keys            = countif(ItemType == 'Key'),
    Secrets         = countif(ItemType == 'Secret'),
    Expired         = countif(IsExpired == true),
    ExpiringSoon    = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false),
    NoExpiry        = countif(HasExpiration == false)
| project pack_array(
    pack('Metric', 'Total Vaults',              'Value', TotalVaults,  'Order', 1),
    pack('Metric', 'Total Items',               'Value', TotalItems,   'Order', 2),
    pack('Metric', 'Certificates',              'Value', Certificates, 'Order', 3),
    pack('Metric', 'Keys',                      'Value', Keys,         'Order', 4),
    pack('Metric', 'Secrets',                   'Value', Secrets,      'Order', 5),
    pack('Metric', 'Expired',                   'Value', Expired,      'Order', 6),
    pack('Metric', 'Expiring < 30 Days',        'Value', ExpiringSoon, 'Order', 7),
    pack('Metric', 'No Expiry Date',            'Value', NoExpiry,     'Order', 8))
| mv-expand Column1 to typeof(dynamic)
| evaluate bag_unpack(Column1)
| sort by Order asc
| project-away Order
content.title: Key Vault Summary

content.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| where HasExpiration == true
| summarize
    Total         = count(),
    Expired       = countif(IsExpired == true),
    Within30Days  = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Red' and IsExpired == false),
    Within31_60   = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 31 and DaysToExpiry <= 60),
    Within61_90   = countif(DaysToExpiry >= 61 and DaysToExpiry <= 90),
    Over90Days    = countif(ExpiryBand == 'Green')
content.title: Key Vault SLA Counts

content.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| summarize Count = count() by ExpiryBand
| order by ExpiryBand asc
content.title: Key Vault Items by Expiry Band

content.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| summarize Count = count() by ItemType
| order by ItemType asc
content.title: Key Vault Items by Type

content.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| summarize Certificates = countif(ItemType == 'Certificate'), Keys = countif(ItemType == 'Key'), Secrets = countif(ItemType == 'Secret') by VaultName, SubscriptionId
| order by VaultName asc
content.title: Items per Vault

content.query:
let filterSub  = '{KV_Subscription}';
let filterType = '{KV_ItemType}';
let filterBand = '{KV_ExpiryBand}';
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| where (filterSub == 'value::all' or SubscriptionId in (split(filterSub, ',')))
| where (filterType == '*' or ItemType == filterType)
| where (filterBand == '*' or ExpiryBand == filterBand)
| project
    VaultName,
    SubscriptionId,
    ResourceGroup,
    ItemType,
    ItemName,
    Enabled,
    ExpiresOn,
    DaysToExpiry = iff(HasExpiration, DaysToExpiry, int(null)),
    ExpiryBand,
    IsExpired
| order by DaysToExpiry asc, VaultName asc
content.title: Key Vault — All Credentials Detail

content.query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| where HasExpiration == false
| project VaultName, SubscriptionId, ResourceGroup, ItemType, ItemName, Enabled
| order by VaultName asc, ItemType asc
content.title: Key Vault — Items Missing Expiration Dates
